name: zion
description: Team-style software delivery for Claude Code: an orchestrated multi-agent crew for building features, a pointer-driven tech-debt and dependency-upgrade fixer, and the shared review rubric behind both.

plugins.name: crew
plugins.description: Claude Code crew/plugin pack with orchestrated agents, commands, hooks, and skills for feature delivery.

plugins.name: engineering-principles
plugins.description: Standalone engineering-principles skill plugin for focused code review standards.

plugins.name: keymaker
plugins.description: Pointer-driven tech debt and dependency upgrade crew. Fixes one identified suppression, rule, or package at a time; produces handoff outlines for platform-scale migrations.
